message:
fix(core): replace panic-prone .expect() with graceful error handling across infrastructure

Replace .expect() calls with .unwrap_or(), .unwrap_or_default(), and
.unwrap_or_else(PoisonError::into_inner) across core infrastructure to
prevent panics on edge cases (zone/epoch/node ID overflows, lock poisoning,
byte conversion failures).

Affected crates: fcp-core (checkpoint, lease, protocol, ratelimit),
fcp-crypto (hpke_seal), fcp-host (batch, progress, resilience, supply_chain),
fcp-mesh (gossip), fcp-raptorq (codec/decoder, decode), fcp-sandbox (linux),
fcp-sdk (ratelimit), fcp-store (repair), fwc (reactive_rules).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
